CreateAsGroupV2.zoneInfo: Availability zone information for the scaling group
CreateAsGroupV2.config.expectNum: Desired node count; defaults to -1. When enabled, health check tasks will automatically inspect and scale in/out to maintain the desired count if actual count differs
CreateAsGroupV2.keypairId: Key pair ID used when creating instances
CreateAsGroupV2.keypairName: Key pair name used when creating instances
CreateAsGroupV2.keepImageLogin: Whether to use the image preset password; optional, defaults to 0. When set to 1, the preset password is used and the image type must be a custom image
CreateAsGroupV2.blb: BLB instances bound to the scaling group; multiple bindings supported
CreateAsGroupV2.blb.blbType: BLB type: Blb - standard BLB, AppBlb - application BLB, Ipv6Blb - IPv6 BLB
CreateAsGroupV2.blb.sgIds: Required when BLB type is application BLB; specifies server group IDs (multiple allowed). Not required for other BLB types
CreateAsGroupV2.blbUnbindWaitTime: The waiting time before unbinding the BLB (load balancer) instance
CreateAsGroupV2.nodes: Node configuration for scaling group scale-out
CreateAsGroupV2.nodes.billing: Scaling group billing mode: post-paid - post, spot - bidding
CreateAsGroupV2.nodes.bidModel: Spot instance release policy: market price release - market, custom release price - custom
CreateAsGroupV2.nodes.zoneSubnet: Zone subnet info in JSON, corresponding to List type. Format: [{"zone": "zoneA","subnetId": "subnetA"},...]
CreateAsGroupV2.eip: Configuration for purchasing a new EIP; use eipConfig field for shared bandwidth EIP
CreateAsGroupV2.eip.eipProductType: EIP public bandwidth billing type: bandwidth-based - bandwidth, traffic-based - netraffic
CreateAsGroupV2.eip.purchaseType: Line type for purchase: standard - BGP, enhanced - BGP_S
CreateAsGroupV2.eipConfig.eipGroupBindStrategy: Binding strategy between shared bandwidth and BCC during scale-out
CreateAsGroupV2.eipConfig.eipGroupUnbindStrategy: Strategy for shared bandwidth during scale-in
CreateAsGroupV2.eipConfig.eipGroupIdList: List of shared bandwidth group IDs
CreateAsGroupV2.billing: Scaling group billing mode: post-paid - post, spot - bidding
CreateAsGroupV2.billing.paymentTiming: Scaling group billing mode: post-paid - postpay, spot - bidding
CreateAsGroupV2.billing.reservation: Not required for post-paid; required for pre-paid
CreateAsGroupV2.rds: RDS instances bound to the scaling group; multiple bindings supported
CreateAsGroupV2.scs: SCS instances bound to the scaling group; multiple bindings supported
CreateAsGroupV2.expansionStrategy: Scale-out strategy; defaults to Priority for single availability zone. Priority - create in single AZ first, Balanced - create evenly across all AZs
CreateAsGroupV2.shrinkageStrategy: Scale-in strategy: Earlier - delete instances created first, Later - delete instances created last
CreateAsGroupV2.assignTagInfo: Tags associated with the scaling group
CreateAsGroupV2.cmdConfig.hasDecreaseCmd: Whether a scale-in script is configured
CreateAsGroupV2.cmdConfig.decCmdStrategy: Scale-in strategy; required. On failure: pause scale-in - Pause, continue scale-in - Proceed
CreateAsGroupV2.cmdConfig.decCmdManual: Whether to execute the scale-in script on manual removal
CreateAsGroupV2.cmdConfig.hasIncreaseCmd: Whether a scale-out script is configured
CreateAsGroupV2.cmdConfig.incCmdStrategy: Scale-out strategy, cannot be empty; on failure: Proceed (continue scaling) or Pause
CreateAsGroupV2.cmdConfig.incCmdManual: Whether to execute the scale-out script on manual addition
CreateAsGroupV2.bccNameConfig.bccName: VM name (optional). No name specified by default. If specified, used as a name prefix for batch creation; a suffix will be appended by the backend
CreateAsGroupV2.bccNameConfig.bccHostname: VM hostname (optional). No hostname specified by default. If specified, used as a hostname prefix for batch creation; a suffix will be appended by the backend
CreateAsGroupV2.bccNameConfig.autoSeqSuffix: Whether to auto-generate sequential suffixes for name and hostname (optional): true - yes, false - no
CreateAsGroupV2.bccNameConfig.openHostnameDomain: Whether to auto-generate hostname domain (optional): true - yes, false - no
